# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: example   # use a suitable namespace, e.g., your-namespace (replace this with the correct value)
spec:
---    // separator to create new section of YAML configuration for another microservice instance or other configurations required by Linkerd Service Mesh further down below    
  ---
apiVersion: v1   # version type, default is 'v1' if omitted.
kind: ConfigMap      # kind in Kubernetes resources (default to configmap) ('ConfigMaps') can be also specified as '' or omit it by leaving space before item name e.g.,  :configmaps:''    // separator for new configuration section below   - title here is optional, you might want spaces around them if they aren't necessary but are otherwise unnecessary
metadata:     # details about the ConfigMap (mandatory)        'title': example-cm       'namespace name should be lowercase. For instance instead of Namespace or namespaces'.  namespace for our config map   // comment here will not affect final YAML, you can add comments as needed by removing leading `'-'
data:    # specifics about the data (mandatory)        example-cm-value1': 'example.com/path1’       this is where your configuration details go e.g., linkerd inject server and authorization policies for services in Kubernetes security context   // comment here will not affect final YAML, you can add comments as needed by removing leading `'-'
